On 06/15/10 10:58, Florent Thoumie wrote:
> Looks ok.
> 
> Any reason why three ports have different distfiles/checksums?
> 
It has to with RG (Rubygems).  Sometimes the authors repackage them when
moving as opposed to simply re-uploading.

It caught me off gaurd in the Part I pr where I only ran make fetch.

Fool me once, shame on me. Fool me twice......
